payload.title: Skill packs Wave 1: ship daily driver packs
payload.summary: Add wc-agent-bootstrap, wc-policy-cli, wc-task-author, and wc-task-delivery under .claude/skills with dual-install to .cursor/skills.
payload.description: Implement Wave 1 from .ai/backlogs/skill-pack-first-party-v1.md: four SKILL.md trees with selection-quality descriptions, thin bodies linking .ai canon, and recommend-skills tags. Migrate task-flow-subagent-delivery into wc-task-delivery.
payload.approach: Follow the backlog per-pack specs. Use the shared SKILL.md body template. Verify list-skills and recommend-skills after each pack lands.
technicalScope: Mirror or symlink Wave 1 ids to .cursor/skills for Cursor agent selection.
Run pnpm exec wk run list-skills and recommend-skills smoke queries from the backlog cheat sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: list-skills returns at least four first-party ids: wc-agent-bootstrap, wc-policy-cli, wc-task-author, wc-task-delivery.
recommend-skills with tags workflow-cannon and delivery returns wc-task-delivery when taskType workspace-kit is set.
create-task accepts metadata.skillIds including wc-task-delivery after packs exist.
SKILL.md bodies link .ai canon only; no full playbook paste.
task-flow-subagent-delivery is superseded or symlinked to wc-task-delivery.

payload.title: Skill packs Wave 2: delivery closure packs
payload.summary: Add wc-pr-review, wc-release-captain, wc-improvement-discovery, and wc-improvement-triage skill packs.
payload.description: Implement Wave 2 from the skill pack backlog: maintainer delivery closure, release captain, and improvement loop packs with playbook anchors.
payload.approach: Ship four SKILL.md trees after Wave 1 is discoverable. Keep tags aligned with recommend-skills contract.
technicalScope: Add wc-pr-review, wc-release-captain, wc-improvement-discovery, wc-improvement-triage under .claude/skills.
Each pack includes workflow-cannon plus workflow-specific discoveryTags from the backlog.
Document Suggested skillIds in relevant .ai/playbooks where the backlog calls for it.
acceptanceCriteria: list-skills lists all four Wave 2 pack ids.
recommend-skills with tags workflow-cannon and release returns wc-release-captain.
recommend-skills with tags workflow-cannon and improvement returns improvement packs.

payload.title: Skill packs Wave 3: intake, UI, and docs packs
payload.summary: Add wishlist, transcript, dashboard, doc governance, agent doc routing, and phase journal skill packs.
payload.description: Implement Wave 3 from the skill pack backlog: six secondary packs for intake, dashboard operator flows, documentation governance, and phase journal work.
payload.approach: Land packs after Wave 1 discovery works. Optional skills.discoveryRoots extension can ship in Wave 4 instead.
technicalScope: Add wc-wishlist-intake, wc-transcript-churn, wc-dashboard-operator, wc-doc-governance, wc-agent-doc-routing, wc-phase-journal.
Validate recommend-skills queries for wishlist and dashboard tags from the backlog cheat sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: list-skills lists all six Wave 3 pack ids.
Each pack description matches backlog selection-quality wording.
recommend-skills smoke tests for wishlist and docs tags pass.
No duplicate discovery id conflicts between .claude and .cursor roots.

payload.title: Skill packs Wave 4: discovery config and playbook hygiene
payload.summary: Extend skills.discoveryRoots, update playbook Suggested skillIds, and close the skill-pack epic acceptance checklist.
payload.description: Wave 4 hygiene from the skill pack backlog: dual-root config, playbook index updates, PROJECT_TOOLS pointer, and epic-level acceptance verification.
payload.approach: Run after Waves 2 and 3 content exists. Prefer workspace-kit config patch over ad-hoc JSON edits.
technicalScope: Add skills.discoveryRoots for .cursor/skills when not redundant with mirrors.
Update .ai/playbooks/README.md and task-to-phase-branch with Suggested skillIds footnotes.
Run full backlog acceptance checklist and list-skills inventory.
acceptanceCriteria: All Wave 1–3 packs discoverable via list-skills.
task-to-phase-branch documents Suggested skillIds wc-task-delivery and wc-policy-cli.
Backlog epic acceptance items in skill-pack-first-party-v1.md are satisfied or explicitly deferred with notes.
recommend-skills cheat sheet queries from the backlog all return expected packs.
